Welcome

  1. Home

High Perch — First Light

Within New Growth — fresh leaves soften the outline

Seen Through Spring — the eye remains visible

Framed in Summer Leaves — the eye holds through the green canopy

Buds and Bells

A subtle shift as snow drifts through the reeds.

A bridge crossing in morning fog

Standing Watch — Layered feathers, long legs, and an attentive posture.

Holding the Perch — A closer look at the intricate breast pattern flowing from the throat to the shoulders.

Something Below — a sudden focus on the brush below has its attention

Hidden lives among petals

Frontal Portrait — a direct look from a quiet perch

Sinewed Bushy Lichen rising from Sunburst Lichen

Golden-eye lichen

Pin-cushion Sunburst Lichen

Hammered Shield in a mosaic of bark lichens

Funeral Bell mushrooms recycling a moss-covered log

Bleeding Bonnet — day 2, extensive mold growth

Rue Anemone — one of Minnesota’s native wildflowers

Twining vines of American bittersweet

Autumn foliage reflected in calm morning light
